user.title: Add a Lithe Audio speaker
user.description: Scan the network for speakers automatically, or enter a speaker's IP address manually.

scan.title: Pick a speaker
scan.description: Found {count} speaker(s). Select one to add.

manual.title: Enter speaker details
manual.description: If you know the speaker's IP address, enter it below. Pick the matching model — TLS is enabled automatically for LS10 speakers (PRO 2, V3, iO1) using a built-in certificate.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Lithe Audio speaker found
zeroconf_confirm.description: A Lithe Audio speaker was found at {host} ({name}). Select the speaker model.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the speaker. Check the IP address and that the speaker is online.

abort.no_devices_found: No Lithe Audio speakers were found on the network.

play_url.name: Play URL
play_url.description: Push a direct audio URL to the speaker.

play_favourite.name: Play Favourite
play_favourite.description: Play a saved favourite by slot.

play_group.name: Play to Cast Group
play_group.description: Play a URL to a Cast group with synchronised LUCI volume.

play_quran_juz.name: Play Quran (Juz)
play_quran_juz.description: Stream a Juz of the Quran (1-30) via the tannoy flow.

save_favourite.name: Save Current to Favourite
save_favourite.description: Save currently-playing track to favourite slot 1-40.

init.title: Lithe Audio — Configure
init.description: Choose what to configure for this speaker.

prayer_general.title: Prayer Schedule — Location & defaults
prayer_general.description: Set your city, country and calculation method. Prayer times are fetched daily from aladhan.com. The default URL and volume below will be used for any prayer that doesn't have its own override.

prayer_disable.title: Disable Prayer Scheduler
prayer_disable.description: This stops all scheduled prayer-time announcements for this speaker. Your settings are kept and can be re-enabled later.

prayer_test.title: Test Adhan / Quran playback
prayer_test.description: Play your chosen URL on this speaker right now to verify it works. Uses the same path the scheduler uses, so if this plays, scheduled prayers will too.

prayer_one.title: Prayer Schedule — {prayer_name} ({step_num}/{step_total})
prayer_one.description: Enable this prayer to schedule a daily announcement. Choose an audio preset or paste a custom URL.

logging.title: Debug logging
logging.description: Set the log verbosity for the lithe_audio integration. Use 'Debug' temporarily when reporting issues; switch back to 'Info' afterwards to keep logs clean.

data.choice: Pick an alarm to edit, or add a new one

alarm_edit.title: {title}
alarm_edit.description: Configure when and what to play. Schedule fires on the chosen speakers at the time specified.

data.name: Alarm name
data.preset_url: Custom Preset URL (used if no preset selected)
data.custom_url: Custom URL (used when source = Custom URL)
data.sunrise_enabled: Sunrise simulation — ramp lights before alarm
data.sunrise_never_dim: Never dim a light below its current brightness

data.choice: Pick a group to edit, or add a new one

group_edit.title: {title}
group_edit.description: Configure which speakers belong to this group. The group appears as a media_player entity that controls all members together.

error.missing_url: Please pick a preset or enter a URL.
error.test_failed: Test playback failed — check the speaker connection.
